author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Added Tensor::update_data() — device-transparent in-place write that handles both CPU (copies into existing Vec) and GPU (uploads to new buffer, swaps StorageBuffer). Fixed all 7 optimizers: Adam, AdamW, RMSProp switched from data()/data_mut() to data_vec()/update_data(). SGD, Adagrad, Muon, LBFGS switched from parameter replacement to update_data(), preserving tensor identity. All 574 core + 127 optimizer tests pass.
